title: Azor bot configuration
description: Behavioural config for azor-acore-bot. Secrets and endpoints live in env vars; everything here is safe to commit.

itemId.description: Item template entry sent to the recipient. Default 11966 = Small Sack of Coins.

minLevel.description: Minimum recipient character level required to receive a gift.

cooldownMs.description: Per-Discord-user cooldown between gifts, in milliseconds.

announcements.description: Whether the bot announces command activity in-game.

global.description: Broadcast command use to the whole realm.

toPlayer.description: Whisper the targeted player when a command runs against them.

enabled.description: Allow-list of slash subcommands the bot will respond to. Use the form 'top.sub', e.g. 'character.info'.
